versions.version_description: This song covers all the correct chords plus assorted riffs during the song. Be sure to listen to the recording to get the acoustic strumming pattern and hammer-ons for the intro chords.
Gno3 is G played without the 3rd finger, same goes for Cno3. First part of intro plays throughout whole song.
This song is tuned down 1/2 step. (D# G# C# F# A# D#). Use a fixed-width font or the tab part and chords will not line up properly.

tuning: Eb Ab Db Gb Bb Eb
content:
[ch]Ebmin[/ch] [ch]Ebmin7[/ch] [ch]Bmaj7[/ch] [ch]C#[/ch] [ch]C#sus4[/ch] [ch]C#7[/ch]  [ch]F#[/ch] [ch]Bsus2[/ch]
